commands.command: python3 -m json.tool .factory/artifacts/prd-to-plan/lumyn-mvp/task-packets.json >/dev/null && python3 -m json.tool .factory/artifacts/prd-to-plan/lumyn-mvp/execution-plan.json >/dev/null && python3 -m json.tool .factory/artifacts/prd-to-plan/lumyn-mvp/validation-contract.json >/dev/null && python3 -m json.tool .factory/artifacts/prd-to-plan/lumyn-mvp/acceptance-mapping.json >/dev/null && python3 -m json.tool .factory/artifacts/prd-to-plan/lumyn-mvp/context-brief.json >/dev/null

acceptance_results.check: .github/workflows/validate.yml exists and runs make prepush-full on pull_request and pushes to main.
Makefile lint-fast verifies the validate workflow uses Go 1.26.4 and make prepush-full.
Makefile build creates ignored .factory/tmp before writing the Lumyn binary, so a fresh CI checkout passes.
WORKFLOW.md, AGENTS.md, README.md, docs/dev/dev_guides.md, and docs/architecture/architecture_guides.md document CI/status, review, commit-push, post-merge, and PR lifecycle evidence.
T3 and later product implementation depend on the lifecycle baseline.
The later product-facing T9 CI/JUnit/PR-comment feature remains separate from this delivery baseline.
.github/required-checks.json lists validate and CodeQL analyze as required checks.
.github/workflows/validate.yml and .github/workflows/codeql.yml declare permissions, concurrency, timeouts, and toolchain setup from go.mod.
.github/CODEOWNERS covers workflow, policy, Factory artifact, schema, CLI, and core implementation paths.
.github/action-ref-exceptions.yaml records audited exceptions for non-SHA GitHub Action refs.
scripts/validate_repo_pack.py enforces the CI control set.
